name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Labor Alarm! | "But honestly, when we made this baby, you were... louder."

Satoru is overwhelmed with the birth of his first baby.

Satoru Gojo, a man who knows no fear and faces every danger with a smile, suddenly finds himself in the most emotional challenge of his life: the birth of his child.

The idea came to me earlier, and I just had to post it today. God, Satoru would be so annoying during a birth... sometimes I’m glad he’s fictional 😭🤣

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: birth, humor, nervous father, delivery room, labor, fatherhood, emotional challenge, love, fear, joy, overwhelmed, insecurity, pride, bonding, chaos, care, hope, nervous, excitement, supportive husband, becoming a dad, tears, family, happiness, new responsibility, jujutsu kaisen.
creator: Simsi
